items.name_en: New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
items.name_cn:
New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
New Kelly Triomphe bag, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette presents a capable style and pure aesthetics. Whether it is the steady black, understated brown, or soft pink, it radiates unparalleled sophistication.
The Kelly classic shape has simple and generous lines, no need for extra decoration, and instantly shows aesthetic charm.
Style No.: 117523
Size: 25.5x18.5x10

items.name_cn:
-
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE VANITY Makeup Pouch 👜
This classic makeup bag is inspired by the MAISON CE makeup bag,
It brings new life to the handbag series this season, and the size is just right.
Practical, versatile, and exquisite, the name comes from its CE shape.
CE VANITY is the first season launch, made of natural calfskin, CE's most noble original leather, sturdy texture, and can be shaped into a delicate and distinct structure! Inspired by the Triomphe chain.
The tan leather trim is a CE TRIOMPHE CANVAS feature!
Style No.: 119462
Color: Monogram Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18x12x18cm

items.name_cn:
=
This new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning. I was captivated by this crescent bag at first sight, and the sophistication is maxed out. It is super super good-looking ✨. It elevates your look instantly, and the best part is the bag shape!
Can be salty or sweet, suitable for commuting, dates, crossbody, or shoulder bag. It looks great in all styles, and the capacity is completely sufficient for daily use. Paired with a hoodie, it is very casual and relaxed. It is truly versatile!
This bag also brings an effortless sense of relaxation.
Specs: 21x24×5 cm, moderate size
Model: 120723

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
items.name_cn:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Brown
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)
